summary: Confirmed that the unknown message handling system is complete and ready for deployment. The system now processes all message types appropriately: passenger orders go to order groups with buttons, driver messages are ignored, blocked users go to blocked group, and unknown messages go to pending group for admin manual review and classification.
current_status: The userbot system is fully complete with comprehensive message handling, admin controls for unknown orders, bot API integration with buttons, private messaging functionality, detailed logging, and robust error handling. All requested features have been implemented and the system is ready for production use.
